threats.title: CISA KEV: Actively Exploited Ivanti Connect Secure Vulnerability
threats.summary: CISA added CVE-2025-22457 to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. Ivanti Connect Secure SSL-VPN being actively exploited for initial access by suspected nation-state actors.

threats.title: Scattered Spider Targeting UK Financial Sector via MFA Fatigue
threats.summary: Scattered Spider conducting MFA fatigue attacks against UK financial sector organisations. Post-compromise activity includes OAuth token theft and cloud storage exfiltration.

threats.title: Volt Typhoon Pre-Positioning in Critical Infrastructure
threats.summary: Volt Typhoon continuing living-off-the-land pre-positioning campaigns in Western critical infrastructure. No malware deployed — uses native tools only to avoid detection.

threats.title: TeamTNT Cryptojacking Campaign Targeting Exposed Kubernetes APIs
threats.summary: TeamTNT scanning for exposed Docker and Kubernetes APIs. Deploying cryptomining containers at scale. Credential harvesting from cloud metadata endpoints observed.

threats.title: APT29 Targeting European Diplomatic Email via OAuth Abuse
threats.summary: APT29 leveraging OAuth device code phishing to steal access tokens for Microsoft 365. Post-compromise email collection and exfiltration to attacker-controlled cloud storage observed.

threats.title: Ransomware Group Targeting Healthcare via Unpatched VPN Appliances
threats.summary: FIN7-affiliated ransomware operators exploiting unpatched Fortinet VPN vulnerabilities for initial access. Full ransomware deployment within 4 hours of compromise. Backup destruction observed.

threats.title: Supply Chain Attack via Compromised NPM Package
threats.summary: Malicious code injected into popular NPM package with 2.3M weekly downloads. Stealer payload exfiltrates environment variables and cloud credentials on installation.

threats.title: CISA KEV: Actively Exploited Cisco IOS XE Web UI Vulnerability
threats.summary: CISA added CVE-2025-20188 to KEV. Unauthenticated RCE in Cisco IOS XE web UI actively exploited for web shell deployment and persistent access.
